nasb.text: make my joy complete by being of the same mind, maintaining the same love, united in spirit, intent on one purpose.

esv.text: complete my joy by being of the same mind, having the same love, being in full accord and of one mind.

cnv.text: 就應當有同樣的思想，同樣的愛心，要心志相同，思想一致，使我充滿喜樂。

ccb.text: 就要同心合意，彼此相爱，灵里合一，思想一致，好让我的喜乐更充足。

csbs.text: 你们就要同心合意——爱心一致、灵里一致、意念一致，好使我的喜乐得以满足。
